ownershipBoundary: Relay-branded AionUi owns UX, conversations, workspace files, skills, approvals, OfficeCLI assistants, and previews. Relay owns only the local OpenAI-compatible M365 Copilot provider gateway, tool-call emulation, diagnostics, and user-local portable tool bootstrap.

aionUi.name: AionUi
notes: AionUi is the source baseline for the Relay Agent product UX.
Relay must replace app name, icons, protocol, installer metadata, update metadata, and first-run provider defaults before distribution.
Relay must not ship upstream remote/channel/provider onboarding defaults as beginner-facing product flow.

officeCli.name: OfficeCLI
notes: Relay stores OfficeCLI under app-local data and prepends that directory to the AionUi child-process PATH.
Relay does not use the upstream PowerShell or shell install scripts in the product first-run path.
The SHA256 value is cross-checked against the upstream OfficeCLI v1.0.76 SHA256SUMS release asset.

compatibilityNotes: This track intentionally replaces the OpenCode Web first-run UX. OpenCode may return later as an optional ACP backend.
M365 Copilot remains an untrusted planner/final-answer writer behind Relay's Tool Call Emulation Layer.
Office file editing must use AionUi skills and OfficeCLI workflows rather than generic OpenCode file-edit tools.
